sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ بِنْتٌ اسْمُهَا إِيمَانُ تُسَاعِدُ أُمَّهَا كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Bila je djevojčica po imenu Iman koja je svaki dan pomagala majci.
sentences.translationEn: There was a girl named Iman who helped her mother every day.

sentences.translation: Metla je kuću i sređivala sto.
sentences.translationEn: She swept the house and tidied the table.

sentences.arabic: مَرِضَتِ الأُمُّ يَوْمًا فَطَبَخَتْ إِيمَانُ الطَّعَامَ بِنَفْسِهَا.
sentences.translation: Jednog dana se majka razbolila pa je Iman sama skuhala hranu.
sentences.translationEn: One day the mother got sick so Iman cooked the food herself.

sentences.translation: Majka je rekla: «Ti si moja dobra kćerka».
sentences.translationEn: The mother said: «You are my kind daughter».
